from itertools import chain


def collect_tags(items):
    return list(chain.from_iterable(item["tags"] for item in items))


def build_report(sections):
    lines = list(chain.from_iterable(s.paragraphs for s in sections))
    return "\n".join(lines)


def flatten_results(responses):
    return list(chain.from_iterable(resp["items"] for resp in responses))


def gather_errors(results):
    return list(chain.from_iterable(
        result.get("errors", []) for result in results
    ))


def merge_datasets(sources):
    return list(chain.from_iterable(source.records for source in sources))
